name: bharat-24-by-7
description: Bharath 24/7 is an AI-powered anti-gravity news platform focused on Indian news aggregation. This futuristic platform features a dynamic float-based UI using Framer Motion.

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
